title: Glowbrick's Printing Press Mod
description: This mod aims to allow enchanted book duplication. This is achieved utilizing the past technologies of a printing press. Glowbrick's Printing Press Mod was made for ModFest 1.21.
body:
# Glowbrick's Printing Press Mod

This mod aims to allow enchanted book duplication. This is achieved utilizing the past technologies of a printing press. Glowbrick's Printing Press Mod was made for ModFest 1.21.

Content added:

# Blocks added include the following:

- Printing Press - crafted with 1 paper, 1 piston, 1 leather, 2 wooden fences (with an empty slot between), and 3 planks
- Typesetter - crafted with 2 movable type, with 1 iron ingot between, 3 planks

# Items added include the following:

- Ink Bottle - crafted with 1 glass bottle and 1 black dye
- Magic Ink Bottle - crafted with 1 ink bottle and 1 bottle o' enchanting or 1 enchanted book
- Movable Type - crafted with 1 leather, 2 iron ingots, and 6 iron nuggets
- Type Block - crafted in a Typesetter with 1 enchanted book and 1 movable type

# To duplicate an enchanted book:

- Craft a Type Block in a Typesetter with the desired enchanted book and a Movable Type
- Print an Enchanted book in a Printing Press with the desired Type Block, 1 Magic Ink Bottle, and a book

# Glowbrick Team:

Ilian - Krysawyr

Carter - Bitflare

Mike - Azinx
